creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Missing checksums make it impossible to install databases/py-gdbm

root@cgiserv:/usr/ports/databases/py-gdbm # make checksum
===>   py27-gdbm-2.7.5_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by py27-gdbm-2.7.5_2 for building
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for python/Python-2.7.5.tar.xz.
=> No suitable checksum found for python/Python-2.7.5.tar.xz.
*** [checksum] Error code 1

Stop in /basejail/usr/ports/databases/py-gdbm.
